testcase.name: test_get_admin_payments

failure.message: AssertionError: No total_revenue in totals assert 'total_revenue' in {'entry_fees': 0, 'total': 0, 'vote_packages': 0}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p1_features.py:149: in test_get_admin_payments assert "total_revenue" in totals, "No total_revenue in totals" E AssertionError: No total_revenue in totals E assert 'total_revenue' in {'entry_fees': 0, 'total': 0, 'vote_packages': 0}

testcase.name: test_get_payment_status

failure.message: AssertionError: Failed to get payment status: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p1_features.py:196: in test_get_payment_status assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get payment status: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get payment status: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_entry_fee_checkout

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status code: 500 - Internal Server Error assert False

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p1_features.py:225: in test_create_entry_fee_checkout assert False, f"Unexpected status code: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status code: 500 - Internal Server Error E assert False
